violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Clean in place equipment dirty/greasy. - Monitor in the food prep area greasy and caked with grease. - Cabinet faces and door handles greasy. - Walk-in cooler has black bacterial growth in the ceiling behind the compressor unit.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors throughout dirty and require a deep cleaning to remove dirt and grease. - Walls dirty throughout - Ceiling has an accumulation of dust build-up.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. - Multiple clean in place pieces of equipment (wire shelves, prep table) require more thorough or more frequent cleaning. Dust/lint build-up.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item * was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. - Dirty paper towel roll on top of sleeve of cups.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors walls and ceiling throughout the kitchen dirty with an accumulation of dust.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
